title: Illinois
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Illinois

The Illinois Consumer Assistance Program is run by the Illinois Department of Insurance. It has walk-in locations in Chicago and Springfield. Staff can answer questions about health insurance regulations, rights, and responsibilities. They can help you file a complaint or appeal a health plan decision. Get consumer help with a problem or question.

Medicaid in Illinois

You can apply for Medicaid in Illinois by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Illinois

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Illinois

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Illinois

CHIP in Illinois

Illinois All Kids covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Illinois All Kids right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Illinois All Kids.
